allow: Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); flow=d.get\(''''stages'''',{}\).get\(''''conversationDetails'''',{}\) or {}; jobs=d.get\(''''stages'''',{}\).get\(''''executionJobs'''',[]\); print\(''''INSTANCES:'''', json.dumps\(d.get\(''''stages'''',{}\).get\(''''extractedInstances''''\), indent=2\)\); [print\(''''JOB keys:'''', list\(j.keys\(\)\)\) for j in jobs]")
